description: Oh, sir. I'm terribly sorry, but Edgelord wanted to draw a clean Alpine-Watchdog-to-Bolt-Hound mirror on the shared Imel artist credit and I had to step in. You see, sir, the credit isn't just a two-card thing — it's four corpus cards across two sets, AND three of those four are personally sold by Imel through his own forrestimel.com portfolio (I verified with a direct fetch, I really did), AND his client list (Blizzard, Wizards, Riot, Valve) is documented on his own about page (I checked that too, I do hope you don't mind). With four credits and an artist-prized-commons signal that strong, sir, the artist-layer node felt — well, it felt right. I really am sorry I couldn't give you the clean mirror.
citations: [Scryfall: artist:"Forrest Imel" search returns 35 total credits — probed 2026-05-26]
[forrestimel.com about page: senior concept artist with Blizzard / Wizards / Riot / Valve client list — direct fetch 2026-05-26 confirmed all four client names present in page HTML]
[forrestimel.com/magic-prints sales page: Alpine Watchdog + Bolt Hound + Daybreak Charger listed as artist-proof prints — direct fetch 2026-05-26 confirmed all three present]
[cards/magic-the-gathering/core-set-2021/2-alpine-watchdog.md Trivia bullet 4: in-corpus citation of Imel client list + artist-proof-portfolio signal, wave 204]
[cards/magic-the-gathering/core-set-2021/14-daybreak-charger.md Trivia bullet 4: in-corpus citation of 35-credit Scryfall catalog + Blizzard/Wizards/Riot client list, wave 204]

other_candidates_considered.verdict: REFUSED — already exists at cards/_characters/liliana-vess.md, commissioned wave 209. Parent dispatch brief mistakenly flagged this as a candidate; per bbl-parent-dispatch-verify discipline, verified by directory glob and node read — node is fully built, two corpus cards already attached (Despark + Gideon's Sacrifice), full canonical-sources block and four-demon-arc body prose in place. No work needed.

other_candidates_considered.candidate: Urgoros, the Empty One character node
other_candidates_considered.verdict: REFUSED — only one corpus card (DOM-109). Single-card legendary, no cohort substrate. Card is also currently vision-unenriched (empty tags_hub) — it's still wave-210 vision-pass territory, not Edgelord territory.

REFUSED for THIS wave — only one corpus card grep'd as 'Belzenlok' (Blessing of Belzenlok, DOM-77). The wave-210 vision batch may add more (DOM-71/77/92/105/109/110 are in-flight). Re-evaluate next wave when the vision pass closes and trivia confirms IP-attribution density. Staged as future-wave watch.

REFUSED at corpus-walk — would require N>=3 corpus credits to clear threshold. Single Urgoros credit visible from the wave-210 candidate set; would need a wider grep to confirm/refute. Defer to future audit wave.

other_candidates_considered.candidate: Gabor Szikszai artist node (already staged Sonnet from wave 209)
other_candidates_considered.verdict: ACKNOWLEDGED — staged for Sonnet per parent dispatch brief. Not duplicating work.

next_pass_suggestions: Forrest Imel node attachment is artist-layer-internal: the four cards already carry `artist: Forrest Imel` in frontmatter and artist_resolve.py is the resolution mechanism — NO ## Connections bullets needed on the cards per the zoltan-boros / dan-murayama-scott / keiji-kinebuchi precedent. Verified by reading 26-makeshift-battalion.md (zero forrest-imel-style wikilinks in body, edges resolve via artist frontmatter field).

Raucous Entertainer (OTJ-177) is vision-passed but NOT trivia-passed. A future trivia pass on that card could add a fourth Imel-citation bullet matching the wave-204 Alpine Watchdog / Daybreak Charger pattern, strengthening the artist-node citation density.

If the wave-210 Belzenlok-related vision batch (DOM-71/77/92/105/109/110) produces 3+ corpus cards with Belzenlok / Cabal Stronghold canonical depiction or naming, a future Edgelord wave could commission either a `belzenlok` character node OR a `cabal-stronghold` symbol/character node. Both are deferred to post-wave-210 evaluation.

Daarken artist credit on Urgoros DOM-109 — needs a wider Scryfall + corpus grep to determine if Daarken has N>=3 BBL corpus credits. Worth a future audit-wave check; the artist is prolific in MTG but BBL coverage is unknown at present.

potion_rule_check.reason_not_refused: Artist-layer commissions are evidence-based, not thesis-based. The Imel commission rests on (a) Scryfall-verified 35-credit catalog with API receipt, (b) artist's own published about-page client list with direct-fetch HTML receipt, (c) artist's own portfolio sales page with three-of-four corpus prints listed and direct-fetch verified, (d) cross-set range (M21 + OTJ), (e) cross-creature-type range within the corpus slice. No thesis-overlay (rebellion / labor / apparatus-of-extraction) is claimed for this node — the body prose explicitly stays at the empirical-catalog register where the artist-layer convention sits. Potion rule does not fire because no curatorial thesis is being attributed to an IP author's stated intent.

claims_checked_against_primary_source.claim: Imel client list: Blizzard, Wizards, Riot, Valve
Imel sells Alpine Watchdog artist proofs
Imel sells Bolt Hound artist proofs
Imel sells Daybreak Charger artist proofs
Imel does NOT currently sell Raucous Entertainer artist proofs
35 total MTG credits across Imel's career

cbg_009_hallucination_guard.note: No verbatim designer quotations claimed — body prose paraphrases the about-page register without quoting it verbatim, avoiding the CBG-009 trap pattern (fabricated Rosewater verbatim phrasing). The trivia-bullet citations from wave 204 trivia passes are quoted verbatim where they already exist in corpus, but those are receipts to corpus prose, not to the original primary source.
